form.formComment: Comes here off a 36-day let-up. At the latest run ran last of 12 at this track on March 3 over 900m, 11 len behind Atago Tenjin carrying 54kg at $38.80. The race before that sat on the speed throughout before fading 9th of 12 at this track on February 6 over 900m, 6 len behind Moulin Alezan carrying 54kg at $49.90. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign second last of 10 at Ohi October 21 over 1200m, 11 len behind Reggae Beach with 54kg at $8.70. Previously first up; second of 13 at Ohi September 3 over 1200m, 2 len behind Yoshino Kamuy with 54kg at $2.10. Must be included.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 0.5 len at Urawa March 17 over 800m defeating Cast Light On carrying 56kg at $4.40. The start before that made ground from midfield; 3rd of 11 at Urawa on February 27 over 800m, 7 len behind Esperado carrying 56kg at $4.80. Big chance to go back-to-back.
